sentences.english: I love fall fashion — boots scarves and cozy sweaters.
sentences.korean: 가을 패션을 좋아해요 — 부츠 스카프 아늑한 스웨터요.

sentences.english: It's my favorite season to dress up.
Summer is my time because I can just wear shorts and a T-shirt every day, no thinking required.
sentences.korean: 여름이 내 계절이에요. 매일 반바지와 티셔츠만 입으면 되니까요. 생각할 필요 없어요.

sentences.english: I hate winter clothes because they're so heavy and bulky, and layering takes forever in the morning.
sentences.korean: 겨울 옷이 싫어요. 너무 무겁고 부피가 커서요. 아침에 레이어링하는 데 한참 걸려요.
